framework.name: On-Behalf-Of (OBO) Token Exchange for Chained Delegation
framework.description: OAuth extension for multi-layer delegation where an agent acting for a user needs to interact with backend services while maintaining the original user's identity and permissions. Critical for complex agent workflows that span multiple services. Note: Microsoft has proprietary implementation that differs from IETF RFC 8693 standard.
framework.raw_quote: On-Behalf-Of (OBO) token exchange: The gold standard for chained delegation... Note: Microsoft's Azure AD has a proprietary OBO implementation that differs from the IETF RFC 8693 standard.
